pr.title: The Frugendorff: Recursive Weight Sharing Research — Cadence Laws + Challenges (1.1325 BPB)

output.summary: Recursive weight sharing fuses flat and crawler loops so few unique blocks support MLP4x depth while GPTQ-aware cadence tweaks tame reuse-induced quantization/EMA issues.
techniques: Fractal looped blocks enabling deeper depth with shared parameters
Asymmetric flat+crawler mix to isolate gradient conflict to crawler stages
GPTQ-aware cadence sweep to stabilize quantized recursion
